title: Training Coordinator
description: Honeywell is a Fortune 100 industrial technology leader serving aerospace, building automation, and specialty materials globally. We invest heavily in developing talent through structured training and mentorship.
responsibilities: Design and deliver technical training programs for operations staff
Manage training schedules, materials, and participant registrations
Evaluate training effectiveness through assessments and feedback
Maintain training records and certifications for compliance
Identify skills gaps and develop targeted training curriculum
Partner with department heads to align training with business needs

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Education, Business, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of training coordination or instructional design experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
